onset.Description: Event onset relative to recording start

trial_type.Description: Trial-level Morse code stimulus identifier derived from the trigger value

block.Description: Experimental block number within each task (1/2/3; each block contains 52 trials)

speed.Description: Presentation-rate condition of the Morse code stimulus (15CPM, 30CPM, or 40CPM)

stim_file.Description: Path to the corresponding audio stimulus file relative to /stimuli
